entries.title: Countries admin index.
entries.notes: Requires package migrations and seeded country rows with ISO2/ISO3 codes and language relationships.
entries.useCase: An administrator reviews available countries before using country and address selectors elsewhere in Capell.

entries.title: Addresses admin index.
entries.notes: Requires seeded addresses connected to seeded countries. Include at least one address with full line, city, state, postal code, and country data.
entries.useCase: An administrator manages reusable postal addresses that other packages can reference instead of duplicating location fields.

entries.title: Create/edit country form.
entries.notes: Open the create or edit modal from `CountryResource`; the current resource uses table actions rather than a separate create page.
entries.useCase: An administrator adds or corrects a country name, ISO code, and language mapping.

entries.title: Create/edit address form.
entries.notes: Open the create or edit modal from `AddressResource`; seed countries first so the country selector is meaningful.
entries.useCase: An administrator creates a structured address with country, street, locality, region, and postal fields.

entries.title: Site settings fields where address data is injected.
entries.notes: Requires the host admin site form that consumes `SiteSchemaExtender` plus seeded countries and addresses.
entries.useCase: A site administrator selects reusable address data while editing site-level settings.
